summary: W1467 refines the W1466 W987 construction by replacing the localized right-adjoint functor input with explicit object map, morphism map, identity law, and composition law fields. It reconstructs the functor from those fields, feeds the resulting W1466 input, and reassembles W981, W945, W730, W986, and W987 while preserving the reconstructed localized right adjoint, unit mapping-cone model, boundary relation, and target/endpoint projections. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1467 constructs W987 from raw boundary fields, raw relation fields, W944 target no-univ data, W973 closed-embedding closedness data, normalized fixed-target fields, source-triangulation fields, endpoint kernel/cokernel-top fields, localized right-adjoint object and morphism maps plus identity and composition laws, localized adjunction unit/counit component and naturality fields, localized adjunction left/right triangle component identity fields, unit-mapping-cone kernel/cokernel-top fields, and unit-mapping-cone iso hom/inv/identity fields rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1467 raw W716/W717 fields, W944, W973, normalized-lift-blueprint, fixed-target uniqueness, source-pretriangulated, source-triangulated, triangle-completion, endpoint closed-embedding, endpoint open-map, endpoint cokernel-top, endpoint kernel-equality, localized right-adjoint object map, localized right-adjoint morphism map, localized right-adjoint identity law, localized right-adjoint composition law, localized adjunction unit component family, localized adjunction unit naturality, localized adjunction counit component family, localized adjunction counit naturality, localized adjunction left triangle component identity, localized adjunction right triangle component identity, unit-mapping-cone model, unit-mapping-cone closed-embedding, unit-mapping-cone open-map, unit-mapping-cone cokernel-top, unit-mapping-cone kernel-equality, unit-mapping-cone iso hom, unit-mapping-cone iso inv, unit-mapping-cone iso hom-inv, and unit-mapping-cone iso inv-hom inputs with real Lean constructions satisfying the positive-witness supplement, or replace them with an explicit positive witness.
Before any future product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
